message:
feat(core): skip external schema refresh for in-memory prepared statements

Memory-backed databases do not need file-backed schema validation on
every prepared-statement execution.  Add `requires_external_schema_refresh`
guard that short-circuits `refresh_prepared_schema_state` for `:memory:`
connections, add a `FSQLITE_PREPARED_SCHEMA_REFRESHES` hot-path counter
to track the optimisation, and add a test proving prepared INSERT/SELECT
on `:memory:` never triggers the refresh path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
